name: Playback Indicator
overview: Shows direct-play / direct-stream / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows in the Jellyfin web UI.
description: A Jellyfin plugin that automatically calculates whether each episode or movie can direct-play on your current device, and shows a colored badge in the web UI. Badges are calculated using your device's actual playback profile — no manual configuration required.

versions.changelog: v0.3.0: Fix plugin loading — strip framework DLLs from package, correct manifest metadata, add config page with cache management
Fix JS injection: now loads globally on all Jellyfin pages via index.html modification + controller endpoint
Initial release: direct-play and transcode badges on episode/movie rows
